Name: Seth's Bone
Desc: Obtained by unlocking Seth's Bone Mindscape Cinema [Slow Reflexes].
Desc2:
A card with a Criminal Investigation Special Response Team (SRT) emblem on it.
It's a standard-issue name card of the Public Security, with a clear and neat printing. When taking the photo, the officer in charge asked for a more "friendly" photo, but still made sure to check the name card for any details that might need to be covered up.
